description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and gable roof combination, featuring a mix of white and stone-textured exterior walls. The front yard is enclosed by a white fence and includes a small landscaped garden with a circular path and a driveway leading to a garage. The backyard is spacious, with a swimming pool, sun loungers, a shaded pergola, and several mature trees providing greenery and shade. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The house has multiple outdoor living areas, including a covered patio and a play area with a swing set. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, stone and white exterior, landscaped front yard, and a backyard featuring a pool, patio, and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white fence, landscaped garden, driveway, garage, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and the start of the backyard with pool and pergola.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with swimming pool, patio, sun loungers, pergola, and mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the full extent of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, small steps, and a covered porch with minimalistic columns and stone accents.
